# Get all Campaigns

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches all of an organization’s assigned campaigns.

## Discussion

This endpoint returns data for all of an organization’s assigned campaigns. You can also use a partial fetch as necessary. For more information, see the Use a Partial Fetch section of [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/using-apple-search-ads-api-functionality].

## Campaign Endpoints

- **Create a Campaign**: Creates a campaign to promote an app.
- **Find Campaigns**: Fetches campaigns with selector operators.
- **Get a Campaign**: Fetches a specific campaign by campaign identifier.
- **Update a Campaign**: Updates a campaign with a campaign identifier.
- **Delete a Campaign**: Deletes a specific campaign by campaign identifier.
